_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to apply the methods, standards, and approaches for describing, analyzing, and documenting an organization's enterprise information technology (IT) architecture (e.g., Open Group Architecture Framework [TOGAF], Department of Defense Architecture Framework [DoDAF], Federal Enterprise Architecture Framework [FEAF]).
reference_document_element_description: Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topology, data domain structure, integration patterns, and data lifecycle policies.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-K-001 (DG, cosine: 0.548), DA-S-001 (DA, cosine: 0.535).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.591). Shared vocabulary: [architecture, enterprise]. DCWF-only terms [ability, analyzing, apply, approaches, defense, department] vs WIDAI-only terms [data, design, document, domain, integration, lifecycle] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.845 (P=0.828, R=0.863). R exceeds P by 0.035 — the WIDAI KSA's 19 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 37 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Ability to apply the methods, standards, and approaches for describing, analyzin" and "Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topolog" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.578 ≈ STS 0.591 (gap 0.012). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [architecture, enterprise] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [architecture, enterprise]. DCWF-only: [ability, analyzing, apply, approaches, defense, department]. WIDAI-only: [data, design, document, domain, integration, lifecycle].
